message:
test: add auth/http tests; deduplicate crc32 and createZip across web modules

- auth.zig: 18 new tests for extractTokenFromQuery, decodeToken,
  percentEncodeToken, hexVal, hexEncodeToken, parseJwtClaims
- http_server.zig: 3 new tests for getContentType (web, image, wasm types)
- Extract crc32() and createZip() to utils.ts, import in file-transfer.ts
  and file-transfer-worker.ts instead of duplicating ~190 lines
